reasoning: I will vote for Biswajit Das because Mamata is still the one who keeps the Centre's hand away from my ration card and my family. Yes, what happened in Sandeshkhali was wrong—haram, completely wrong—but this is what happens when power has no watching, and the BJP would do the same to us, maybe worse, because we are Muslim. I am not blind to the corruption, but I am also not blind to what will happen to me if the Centre gets its way with NRC and CAA. My bread depends on Mamata standing between us and Delhi. That has not changed.
primary_drivers: Fear of Centre control over ration card and NRC implementation under BJP
Belief that BJP + Hindu nationalism poses existential threat to Muslim livelihood and safety
Mamata's resistance to Centre overreach (BSF, NRC) more important than condemning one leader's crimes
